public_name: Time-bounded suspected infection with organ dysfunction
intended_population: Adult ICU stays with a time-stamped suspected-infection match and a clinically accepted organ-dysfunction threshold
clinical_label: Suspected infection with organ dysfunction established before forecasting begins
inclusion_rules: First evidence time at which antibiotic-culture matching and a >=2 SOFA increase are both established; at least one full state/action/target triple inside the ICU stay
exclusion_rules: Diagnosis-only sepsis; future-max SOFA qualification; missing evidence treated as normal; no fully stay-bounded triple
source_tables_and_fields: prescriptions starttime/stoptime/drug; microbiologyevents charttime/chartdate/specimen; time-stamped SOFA components
evidence_cutoff: All identity evidence available no later than anchor; state evidence strictly before t
anchor_definition: Earliest completed 4h evidence time when suspected infection and reviewed SOFA increase >=2 are jointly satisfied; t0 is that evidence time
pre_action_state_interval: Fully contained 4h bins in [max(intime,anchor-24h),t); no padding from outside ICU
icu_stay_eligibility: For t=anchor+4k require [t-4h,t), [t,t+4h), and [t+4h,t+8h) inside same ICU stay; t+8h <= min(outtime,anchor+48h)
outcome_origin_followup_censoring: Primary target is next-bin forecasting; auxiliary in-hospital death from anchor through same-admission discharge; survivor censored at discharge; inconsistent or missing outcome fields unavailable
subject_role_hash_rule: sha256('KDD-RV-SUBJECT-ROLE-v1|' + decimal_subject_id); first 8 bytes big-endian mod 10000; train 0-6999 val 7000-8499 sealed_test 8500-9999
action_selection_roles: train for cutpoints/preprocessing; validation for choosing binary versus preregistered train-quantile 3-bin vasopressor encoding; sealed test never selects
action_contract: Vasopressor recorded intensity only; no policy score
permitted_features: Pre-t physiology values/masks/recency; demographics fixed before admission; prior treatment history ending before t
prohibited_features: Current action-bin treatment; current-admission diagnosis proxy; elixhauser proxy; future values; discharge/death fields; out-of-stay events

public_name: Structured respiratory-support event with observed ventilator settings
intended_population: Adult ICU stays with a time-stamped structured respiratory-support event and observed ventilator settings
clinical_label: Respiratory-support management event; not exact invasive-ventilation onset
inclusion_rules: First qualifying charted ventilation indicator or time-stamped respiratory-support procedure/input event; at least one full state/action/target triple
exclusion_rules: Whole-admission respiratory diagnosis alone; no time-stamped support; exact invasive-onset label; no eligible triple
source_tables_and_fields: chartevents charttime/itemid; procedureevents and inputevents starttime/endtime/itemid plus d_items label
evidence_cutoff: Identity evidence available at anchor; state strictly before t
anchor_definition: First qualifying structured respiratory-support event inside ICU
fallback_policy: No ICU-start or diagnosis-only fallback; rename rather than infer invasive onset
action_interval: Observed PEEP in [t,t+4h); missing remains missing and is never class zero
icu_stay_eligibility: Same fully contained triple rule; t+8h <= min(outtime,anchor+48h)
outcome_origin_followup_censoring: Primary next-bin target plus auxiliary in-hospital death contract identical to sepsis
action_selection_roles: train for scaling/cutpoints; validation for continuous-clipped versus preregistered train-quantile 5-bin PEEP encoding; sealed test never selects
action_contract: Observed PEEP with observation mask; no imputed action class
permitted_features: Pre-t cardiopulmonary physiology and other permitted common state
prohibited_features: Current PEEP or FiO2 in state; missing-as-zero action; whole-admission diagnosis; future/out-of-stay data; outcome fields

public_name: Time-bounded KDIGO-compatible creatinine or RRT event
intended_population: Adult ICU stays with time-stamped creatinine change meeting reviewed KDIGO-compatible criteria or time-stamped RRT initiation
clinical_label: AKI/renal-support event based on creatinine history or RRT; urine-output identity deferred
inclusion_rules: Creatinine increase >=0.3 mg/dL from a prior value in 48h or >=1.5x lowest prior value in 7d using only earlier values; or first RRT start; at least one eligible triple
exclusion_rules: Admission ICD-at-ICU-start; BUN-only anchor; future baseline; chronic/pre-existing RRT under reviewed exclusion; no eligible triple
source_tables_and_fields: labevents charttime/itemid/valuenum; procedureevents starttime/endtime/itemid plus d_items label
evidence_cutoff: Only measurements or RRT starts available no later than anchor
anchor_definition: Earliest qualifying creatinine or RRT evidence time inside ICU
fallback_policy: No ICD fallback; urine-output KDIGO identity unavailable in v1 pending validated weight/time coverage
action_interval: Factorized binary diuretic exposure and RRT support in [t,t+4h)
icu_stay_eligibility: Same fully contained triple rule; t+8h <= min(outtime,anchor+48h)
outcome_origin_followup_censoring: Primary next-bin target plus auxiliary in-hospital death contract identical to sepsis
action_selection_roles: Action families and binary factorization fixed before data; train-only preprocessing; validation-only support gate; sealed test never selects
action_contract: Binary diuretic and RRT recorded exposures
permitted_features: Pre-t renal/hemodynamic physiology; prior creatinine history; masks/recency
prohibited_features: Admission diagnosis; future creatinine; BUN-only identity; current action; discharge/death; out-of-stay events

public_name: Prior-encounter AF/flutter with current rate/rhythm-management anchor
intended_population: Adult ICU stays whose subject has AF/flutter coded in a completed prior encounter and a current time-stamped rate/rhythm-management event
clinical_label: Pre-existing AF/flutter disease identity with a current management anchor
inclusion_rules: Prior admission AF/flutter ICD-9 42731/42732 or ICD-10 I48*; prior dischtime < current admittime; first qualifying current ICU rate/rhythm prescription; at least one eligible triple
exclusion_rules: Current-admission diagnosis; medication without prior disease evidence; anticoagulation alone; no eligible triple
source_tables_and_fields: diagnoses_icd subject_id/hadm_id/icd_code/icd_version; admissions admittime/dischtime; prescriptions starttime/stoptime/drug/route
evidence_cutoff: Prior diagnosis considered available only at prior encounter discharge; must precede current admission; state strictly before t
anchor_definition: First qualifying rate/rhythm-control prescription start inside current ICU after prior disease evidence
fallback_policy: No medication-defined or current-admission diagnosis fallback; task is unavailable for subjects lacking prior evidence
icu_stay_eligibility: Same fully contained triple rule; t+8h <= min(outtime,anchor+48h)
outcome_origin_followup_censoring: Primary next-bin target plus auxiliary in-hospital death contract identical to sepsis
action_selection_roles: Action family and binary encoding fixed before data; train-only preprocessing; validation-only support gate; sealed test never selects
action_contract: Binary rate/rhythm-control exposure only; anticoagulation may be pre-t context if it ends before t
permitted_features: Pre-t heart rate/BP/electrolyte/renal/coagulation observations; prior AF evidence flag
prohibited_features: Current-admission diagnoses; medication as identity; current action; future/outcome/out-of-stay fields
reviewer_specialty: cardiology or electrophysiology plus critical care

public_name: Prior-encounter heart failure with current decongestion anchor
intended_population: Adult ICU stays whose subject has heart failure coded in a completed prior encounter and a current time-stamped decongestion event
clinical_label: Pre-existing heart-failure identity with a current volume-management anchor
inclusion_rules: Prior admission ICD-9 428* or ICD-10 I50*; prior dischtime < current admittime; first qualifying current ICU diuretic or vasodilator event; at least one eligible triple
exclusion_rules: Current-admission diagnosis; medication or volume exposure without prior HF evidence; generic volume-overload code alone; no eligible triple
source_tables_and_fields: diagnoses_icd subject_id/hadm_id/icd_code/icd_version; admissions admittime/dischtime; prescriptions/inputevents start/end/drug/itemid
evidence_cutoff: Prior diagnosis considered available only at prior encounter discharge; must precede current admission; state strictly before t
anchor_definition: First qualifying diuretic or vasodilator start inside current ICU after prior disease evidence
fallback_policy: No medication-defined or current-admission diagnosis fallback; task is unavailable for subjects lacking prior evidence
icu_stay_eligibility: Same fully contained triple rule; t+8h <= min(outtime,anchor+48h)
outcome_origin_followup_censoring: Primary next-bin target plus auxiliary in-hospital death contract identical to sepsis
action_selection_roles: Action family and binary encoding fixed before data; train-only preprocessing; validation-only support gate; sealed test never selects
action_contract: Binary diuretic exposure; vasodilator may be pre-t context if it ends before t
permitted_features: Pre-t fluid-balance/renal/hemodynamic/oxygenation observations; prior HF evidence flag
prohibited_features: Current-admission diagnoses; medication as identity; current action; future/outcome/out-of-stay fields
